ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, NOT(ISPICKVAL( StageName , 'Closed Won')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( StageName , 'Closed Lost')), ProjectStart__c < TODAY() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Start Date of the Project has to be a date in the future. If the the project already started please close opportunity and create a project accordingly (Opp007).
